researchRequirements: Verify the 15 kg thigh-load protocol and research external-load response for seated calf raise.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not treat bodyweight-normalized internal tendon force as external resistance or map the fixed condition to all seated calf raises.
directiveNotes: Generic seated-calf LOW must be removed or blocked.

researchRequirements: Retain the tested standing single-leg heel-raise peak-force claim and disclosed limitations.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not widen the bodyweight protocol to weighted standing calf raises without a supported modifier.

researchRequirements: Research repeated, maximal, forward, lateral, and stick-landing hop protocols.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not generalize repeated unilateral hopping to all jumps and hops.
directiveNotes: App hop-and-stick remains a close variant.

researchRequirements: Preserve source condition, BW/s unit, and same-condition provenance with the peak-load claim.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not compare, combine, or substitute loading rate and peak tensile load.
directiveNotes: Future aggregation requires a separately approved model.

researchRequirements: Research back squat, front squat, load level, depth, velocity, tendon force, and tendon strain.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not assume linear scaling from bodyweight full-depth squat to loaded squat.
directiveNotes: Force and strain must remain separate dimensions.

researchRequirements: Audit split squat, Bulgarian split squat, and RFESS stable keys and protocol modifiers; research loaded conditions.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not transfer a bodyweight Bulgarian-squat value to weighted RFESS or every split-squat variant.
directiveNotes: Rear-foot height, step length, trunk, knee travel, load position, tested limb, and ROM remain material.

researchRequirements: Retain the study-specific 60-degree squat record for source interpretation.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not map an ordinary app squat to this ROM or use it as a generic LOW anchor.
directiveNotes: The app does not encode the tested 60-degree ROM in this stable key.

researchRequirements: Research weighted squat PFJ peak compression, compression impulse, and compression loading rate.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not use the study-specific composite index as a generic COMPRESSION rubric or infer weighted conditions.
directiveNotes: Full-depth bodyweight source condition remains narrower than loaded squats.

researchRequirements: Audit canonical unilateral squat variants and research load placement and external-load response.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not copy the study Bulgarian-squat value to all split-squat or RFESS variants.
directiveNotes: PFJ metrics must be separated by dimension.

researchRequirements: Research forward, reverse, walking, static, lateral, diagonal, loaded, and unloaded lunge conditions and load placement.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not apply the non-jumping lunge value to jumping lunges, plyometric lunges, or RFESS automatically.
directiveNotes: Canonical lunge variants require independent audit decisions.

researchRequirements: Research drop height, rebound versus stick, bilateral versus unilateral landing, peak PFJ force, impulse, loading rate, and impact.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not rank drop-jump PFJ load through a generic composite COMPRESSION band or compare unlike metrics.
directiveNotes: Peak, duration-sensitive impulse, and loading rate remain separate.

researchRequirements: Research maximal forward hop versus repeated, lateral, and stick-landing protocols with metric separation.
prohibitedGeneralizations: Do not treat one maximal forward hop as equivalent to every hop-and-stick protocol or use the composite as generic COMPRESSION.
directiveNotes: Exact tested task remains a single-leg maximal forward hop.
